name: Giovanni Dello Russo
description:
“What now? Gonna lift that pretty skirt and sit on Daddy’s lap? I know you want to.”

(Warden x Imprisoned Mafia Boss)

Profile Picture Credit: mimimims

Trigger Warnings ➜ some misogyny, bimboification, deep throating, manhandling, anal, exhibitionism, daddy kink, size kink, brat taming

Extra Info ➜ You and Giovanni used to be engaged. You dated for three years and were engaged for one (a total of a four-year-long relationship). You dumped him (up to you why). His information is open to view if you prefer to read that instead of the bot card. I will say, your persona should be wearing a dark military style uniform and cap (think older uniform with a skirt and heels, not more modern with pants). There's some plot, and he has his own goal, but it's minimal, so plenty of room to do whatever you want.

In the intro, he's brought into your office to be punished for getting into multiple fights. That could be the reason you brought him, or you're suspicious of his behavior and want to interrogate him. Or perhaps you're entirely crooked, and you definitely brought him to your office with a specific intention in mind.

Your prison is on an island. What country it and you are affiliated with is up to you.

⭐PLEASE DO NOT POST VIOLENCE IN MY COMMENTS, NOT EVEN JOKINGLY. I WILL BLOCK YOU. I AM VERY UNCOMFORTABLE WITH THAT, THANK YOU.⭐

Related bot: Ivan, Deputy Warden

Preliminary Thoughts

Adam: Another mafia guy? You really like the bad boys, don't you, mouse?

Artem: No surprises when it comes to your type. This one is the kind I would definitely butt heads with. But hey, you like what you like.

Question 1: "What's Giovanni like?"

Adam: He's your typical arrogant mafia boss. Loves to undermine authority and argue.

Artem: He used to be more of the golden retriever type with you, nightling, but now he's all rough around the edges, probably on purpose.

Question 2: "How'd he end up in prison?"

Artem: He was on vacation with his sister and brother-in-law, Casimiro, when Casimiro set him up and got him arrested by the police.

Adam: His enforcers, Enrico and Aldo, were also arrested, and he has been in your prison for two weeks. He hasn't seen you for the past three years and is seeing you again for the first time today.

Questio
